title: Cross Mace
description: This texture pack turns the mace into a massive cross.
body: Tired of the boring 2D Mace texture and want to feel like the power of God is on your side? Well do I have the texture for you! This pack turns the mace into a massive cross and also has an alternate version with custom sound effects. All you have to do is name your mace Cross in an anvil! This mod does require either optifine or Cit resewn for fabric.
